why_v1_1_was_revised: Verified first-hand: convoy 5000/48h = 2500 rations/day ~= thesis demand 2400-2600/day and S1 = 2564/day, S2 = 5128/day. Transport is the binding constraint; S2 fills SB with immovable stock without increasing delivery -> dynamic shift control is a dead dimension. The V1.1 'emergency-reserve overlay' (convoy on top of a complete normal flow) would deliver ~5000/day vs 2500/day demand -> convoy rarely binds -> no scarcity -> mechanism dies. The convoy must BE the scarce downstream transport.

ontology_decision_pending_garrido.option_A_primary_downstream_transport: the convoy IS the scarce SB->CSSU transport at thesis scale (physics-favored: 2500/day matches thesis flow)
ontology_decision_pending_garrido.option_B_emergency_overlay: normal flow continues; convoy moves only an extra reserve (dictamen #2 preference; risks non-binding convoy)
ontology_decision_pending_garrido.verifier_recommendation: Option A (transport-binding); the overlay is non-binding by the throughput math

demand.split: D_A = round(D_base/2 * m(Z_A)); D_B = D_programG - D_A
demand.surge_2x_3x_rejected: a sustained 4-8 week 50% regime is already severe; a 1-day R24 spike != a 2-month regime
demand.conservation_rule: D_A + D_B identical ACROSS POLICIES on the same tape; NOT forced equal to original thesis demand when regimes are active

signal.route_threat_score_excluded_from_primary: mixing demand and R22 into one variable makes accuracy uninterpretable

placebos_required.circular_block_shuffled: per CSSU, within tape, preserves positive rate + approx run lengths
placebos_required.post_onset_delayed: same signal delivered L+1 weeks late (after the onset it predicted)

primary_risks.rationale: isolate tempo + signal + shared convoy; reintroduce the rest only AFTER a pass and never to select the primary environment

static_comparators.primary_bar: best full-contract static = best over the 120 periodic calendars + convex hull, within a matched resource envelope

mechanism_ladder.name: nested mechanism ladder (NOT a factorial)
mechanism_ladder.convoy_physical_memory_false_means: resource re-available at each dispatch opportunity, does not carry availability week to week; scarcity NOT removed, no free convoys
mechanism_ladder.TRSC_deferred: no defensible holding/expiry coefficients; resource envelope already guards against buying the improvement; report a resource/Pareto vector, not fabricated money

grid.adjacency: two cells adjacent iff they differ by exactly one level on exactly one axis
grid.valid_region: connected component of >= 2 cells passing all gates
grid.primary_cell: first in that order inside a valid connected component -- the minimally sufficient condition

blocking_requirements: Garrido confirms convoy ontology (Option A vs B) and the convoy-equivalent framing
build_gate.reason: The transport-binding physics changes the mechanism; Garrido must confirm the convoy is the real scarce downstream transport before any tape is generated.

forbidden_rescues: authorize build before Garrido confirms the convoy ontology
restore dynamic S1/S2 to the primary action space after seeing a signal
grow the action space from 3 to 6 mid-study
select the max-ReT cell instead of the minimally-sufficient cell in a connected region
use surge 2x/3x to manufacture a decisional surface
monetize TRSC with invented holding/expiry coefficients
